Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I have identified the neighbor atoms of atom 22 (Carbon).

## Neighbor Atoms of C:22

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 16 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 18 | C (Carbon) |
| 21 | C (Carbon) |
| 23 | H (Hydrogen) |

Atom 22 is a carbon atom that is covalently bonded to four atoms: nitrogen (16), two carbons (18 and 21), and one hydrogen (23). This forms a tetrahedral-like geometry typical of sp3 hybridized carbon, though in this aromatic system it appears to be part of a heterocyclic ring structure.
